chapter_title: Spec. Provisions & Exceptions for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
Notwithstanding Section 621.206 (Maximum Extended Length of Load) , an automobile transporter that is stinger-steered may carry a load that extends not more than:

(1) four feet beyond its front; and

(2) six feet beyond its rear.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 622. Spec. Provisions & Exceptions for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 622.153 — Maximum Extended Length of Load

Notwithstanding Section 621.206 (Maximum Extended Length of Load) , an automobile transporter that is stinger-steered may carry a load that extends not more than:

    (1) four feet beyond its front; and

    (2) six feet beyond its rear.

*Added by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 411 (S.B.1815), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2021.*
